description: Central registry for public diagnostics emitted by the current compiler surface.

documentation.summary: A single token exceeds the lexer byte limit.
documentation.cause: The lexer cannot safely classify a token whose byte length is above the configured limit.
documentation.correction: Shorten the token, split generated identifiers, or move large data into a string or external resource.

documentation.summary: The parser found a token that cannot start a module item.
documentation.cause: Only declarations, imports, exports, and related module items are valid at top level.
documentation.correction: Replace the token with a valid declaration keyword or move the statement inside a procedure.

documentation.summary: The bootstrap parser expected an export marker required by its subset contract.
documentation.cause: The source does not satisfy the bootstrap subset shape used by the seed compiler.
documentation.correction: Add the required export marker or use the full compiler path for non-bootstrap source.

documentation.summary: A referenced name is not visible in the current scope.
documentation.cause: No local declaration, imported symbol, or exported module item matches the identifier at the use site.
documentation.correction: Declare the identifier, import the module that exports it, or rename the use to an in-scope symbol.

documentation.summary: Module loading reached a module that is already in the active import stack.
documentation.cause: Two or more modules depend on each other directly or transitively.
documentation.correction: Move shared declarations into a third module or split the interface so imports form a directed acyclic graph.

documentation.summary: The assigned expression type does not satisfy the target binding type.
documentation.cause: The type checker compares the inferred expression type against the declared or inferred target type and they differ.
documentation.correction: Assign a value of the declared type or change the declaration only when the broader contract is wrong.

documentation.summary: A binary operator received operands with incompatible types.
documentation.cause: The operator rule requires compatible operand types before MIR lowering.
documentation.correction: Convert or replace one operand so both sides satisfy the operator contract.

documentation.summary: A value is read after ownership has been moved away.
documentation.cause: Borrow checking found a later use of a binding whose ownership was consumed on an earlier path.
documentation.correction: Use the value before the move, borrow it instead of moving it, or create a new value.
